name: io.github.hairglasses-studio.systemd-mcp
description: Systemd service and timer management for Linux hosts

tools.name: systemd_status
tools.description: Show unit status (active state, PID, memory, CPU)

tools.name: systemd_logs
tools.description: Fetch journal logs (configurable lines, since filter)

tools.name: systemd_list_units
tools.description: List units with optional state filter

tools.name: systemd_list_timers
tools.description: List active timers with trigger times
